FeaturedWork.title: Featured Work
FeaturedWork.description: A selection of our recent digital products. Built for performance, designed to convert.

eliteeats.problem: Restaurant owners struggled with customers constantly asking about the menu and couldn't respond quickly.
eliteeats.solution: We built a digital menu web app where customers browse meals and order directly via WhatsApp, streamlining the process.

pharmacy.problem: Pharmacies needed a professional online presence to build trust and make services accessible.
pharmacy.solution: A modern landing page optimized for conversions with fast loading, SEO, and smooth UX across devices.

portfolio.problem: Professionals needed a standout way to showcase skills and attract clients.
portfolio.solution: A sleek portfolio built with Next.js 14, featuring smooth animations, interactive sections, and contact form.

titan.problem: Gym owners needed a centralized platform to manage memberships, trainers, and subscriptions.
titan.solution: A comprehensive gym platform with user auth, trainer profiles, flexible subscriptions, and SEO optimization.

restaurant.problem: Restaurants needed an online ordering system that converts visitors without complexity.
restaurant.solution: A fast restaurant app with smart cart, instant quantity updates, and auto-save for seamless ordering.

coza.problem: E-commerce businesses needed a store with smooth shopping experience that converts visitors.
coza.solution: A professional store with organized products, smart cart with auto-pricing, wishlist, and advanced filtering.
